title: myobroma nummularia
intro: Myobroma nummularia, also known as the nummularia myobroma or Asian umbrella tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myoporaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Myobroma nummularia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and aid in the treatment of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Myobroma nummularia is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for oral consumption, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies for topical application.
